stemHtml: A Commercial Air Transport Operator plans a flight over the North Atlantic with a two-engine, fully operational, Performance Class A aeroplane. ETOPS operational approval has been granted. The flight is full, with 180 passengers. Each point of the selected route must NOT be further away from…

options.a: An available adequate en-route aerodrome meeting the required weather and operating planning minima at the anticipated time of landing and until 1 hour after, within a distance flown in 120 minutes at the One-Engine-Inoperative cruising speed.
options.b: An available adequate en-route aerodrome meeting the required weather and operating planning minima at the anticipated time of landing and until 1 hour after, within the Operator's approved diversion time.
options.c: An adequate en-route alternate aerodrome located within a distance flown in 120 minutes at the One-Engine-Inoperative cruising speed.
options.d: An adequate en-route alternate aerodrome located within a distance flown in the Operator's approved diversion time.
